title: Front Desk Receptionist & HR Admin
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Perform HR admin duties, such as leave administration, updating staff information, etc.
  • Handle Front Desk Receptionist duties, including welcoming clients and managing meeting room bookings.
  • Sort & distribute incoming mails including, filing, scanning, uploading and renaming of documents.
  • Maintain a tidy and professional reception area, meeting rooms, and pantry.
  • Assist clients by serving drinks and directing them to meeting rooms before notifying Financial Advisors.
  • Perform data entry duties.
  • Manage office supplies – order, monitor, and process purchase orders and invoices.
  • Mail out cheques and dropping off cheques at quick cheque deposit box.
  • Coordinate local and overseas couriers as required.
  • Manage IT and printer issues, including basic troubleshooting and coordinating with outsourced service providers for timely resolution.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties.


Job Requirements

  • Diploma in Human Resources Management/Business Administration, Higher Nitec/ Nitec, or GCE 'O' Level.
  • At least 2 years of experience in a receptionist/administrative role, with preferably 1 - 2 years of experience in HR admin.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and strong computer literacy.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills – professional, friendly, and service-oriented.
  • Highly organized, responsible, and detail-oriented with the ability to multi-task.
  • Self-motivated, proactive, and eager to learn new skills.
  • A strong team player who thrives in a collaborative environment

If you are looking for a dynamic and supportive workplace where you can grow professionally while maintaining work-life balance, click apply now, we would love to hear from you!

GFC is an equal opportunity employer, and we value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate against employees based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetic information.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description: Global Financial Consultants (GFC) is one of Singapore’s most venerable and longest established wealth management and financial advisory businesses. Based in the heart of the financial district of Singapore, GFC is focused on providing a tailored and client-centric approach to help safeguard our clients’ financial future whilst guiding them on the path to achieve their personal financial goals and objectives. Our MAS regulated Financial Advisors pride themselves on providing professional and unbiased financial advice that helps our clients create and protect their wealth.
postedCompany.name: GLOBAL FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
